task_description: Create a consensus implementation plan for persistent backend lifecycle, explicit stop, visible per-agent terminal windows, per-agent LLM config, and config persistence using .omx/specs/deep-interview-bridge-persistent-subagent-tty-llm-config.md.
architect_resolution: runtime lease metadata (`runtimeId` + owner PID) instead of PID-only control
connectExisting() must never create a backend
stop waits and owner is sole final state writer
separate attach-plan construction from OS window launching
inactive runtime allows stale status only; spawn/route/restart/stop fail
redact apiKey from CLI/status output while allowing plaintext internal persistence
non_blocking_followups: Confirm opencode attach env/flag contract for apiKey/baseUrl/model during implementation
Define Linux terminal fallback order and no-terminal error copy
